title: ASR Outdoor 18pc Deluxe Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit Mini Rubber Sluice Box
description:
Explore streams, rivers, and outdoor prospecting sites with this 18-piece gold mining kit featuring a mini rubber sluice box, three dual riffle gold pans, three classifiers, digging tools, magnetic black sand separators, a snifter bottle, three collection vials, gloves, and a gemstone quality inspection tool. Designed to help sort material, recover fine gold, remove unwanted concentrates, and examine discoveries, this portable kit provides a convenient all-in-one solution for prospecting, mineral collecting, and outdoor exploration.

ASR Outdoor 18pc Deluxe Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit Mini Rubber Sluice Box
Equip yourself for your next prospecting adventure with the ASR Outdoor 18pc Deluxe Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit. This comprehensive collection combines gold recovery, material sorting, collection, and inspection tools into one convenient package suitable for hobbyists and experienced prospectors alike.

The kit features a compact mini rubber sluice box designed for portability and efficient fine gold retention. Its lightweight construction makes it easy to carry into remote locations while helping process material in a variety of prospecting conditions.

Three dual riffle gold pans in 8-inch, 10-inch, and 12-inch sizes allow for effective material separation at multiple stages of recovery. Included 1/4 inch, 1/12 inch, and ultra-fine 1/50 inch classifiers help sort concentrates by size, making downstream processing more efficient.

A tri-fold shovel, heavy-duty green scoop, and high-visibility orange trowel provide versatile digging and material handling capabilities. The kit also includes 8 lb and 16 lb magnetic separator tools that assist with removing magnetic black sand from concentrates.

For collection and storage, a 3 oz snifter bottle and three glass vials (3/4 dram, 2 dram, and 3 dram) help secure recovered material. Protective gloves support comfortable field use, while the gemstone quality inspection tool assists with examining gold, minerals, gemstones, and other prospecting finds. Compact and easy to transport, this deluxe kit is well suited for gold panning, sluicing, mineral collecting, and outdoor exploration.
Key Features
  • COMPLETE 18PC PROSPECTING KIT - Includes mini rubber sluice box gold pans classifiers digging tools magnetic separators snifter bottle three collection vials gloves and gemstone quality inspection tool
  • COMPACT MINI RUBBER SLUICE BOX - Flexible lightweight design helps retain fine gold while remaining easy to transport and use in a variety of prospecting locations
  • THREE CLASSIFIERS FOR MATERIAL SORTING - Features 1/4 inch 1/12 inch and ultra-fine 1/50 inch classifiers for improved separation and concentrate processing
  • DUAL MAGNETIC SEPARATOR TOOLS - Includes 8 lb and 16 lb black sand separators to remove magnetic material and improve concentrate visibility
  • COLLECT STORE AND INSPECT FINDS - Equipped with snifter bottle three glass vials gloves and gemstone quality inspection tool for prospecting mineral collecting and field use
Specifications
MPN: ASR-HFE43-54FE
UPC: 810131708832
Number of Pieces Included: 18
Mini Sluice Box Material: TPR Rubber
Water Resistant: Yes

Designed to help sort material, recover fine gold, remove unwanted concentrates, and examine discoveries, this portable kit provides a convenient all-in-one solution for prospecting, mineral collecting, and outdoor exploration.
